metadata.description: Deep-research and cache-first bundles for Claude Code. Contains the parallect (multi-provider research) and prxhub (verified .prx bundle registry) plugins.

plugins.name: parallect
plugins.description: Multi-provider deep research: runs Perplexity, Gemini, OpenAI, Grok, and Anthropic in parallel, then synthesizes cross-referenced reports with typed claims, confidence scores, and follow-on suggestions.

plugins.name: prxhub
plugins.description: Cache-first access to the prxhub.com bundle registry. Search, download, cite, and publish verified .prx research bundles before spending compute on new research. Free to read, no account required.
